# Repository Instructions

Use `AGENTS.md` as the canonical source of project instructions.

Before editing code, read the applicable sections of `AGENTS.md` and follow its commands, architecture rules, design-system guidance, CMS constraints, and verification expectations.

For websites built from a design file or design brief, also read:

- `docs/design-to-site.md`
- `docs/project-brief.template.md`
- `docs/client-build-plan.template.md`
- `docs/component-registry.md`
